headline: Why Arista Networks (ANET) Is Down 6.1% After Upgrading 2026 Outlook On AI Data Center Demand
summary: In recent months, Arista Networks reported exceptionally strong 2025 results driven by AI Center demand, raised its 2026 revenue growth outlook, and gained fresh analyst coverage highlighting its role in high-speed AI data center networking. NVIDIA’s US$2 billion investment in Marvell and expansion of the NVLink Fusion ecosystem also indirectly lifts Arista, as its Etherlink AI networking platform participates in the open NVLink Fusion framework and could benefit from broader third-party...
